name: Daily Water Intake Calculator
desc: Calculate how many litr is of water you should drink per day based on weight and exercise.
seo_title: Daily Water Intake Calculator – How Much Water to Drink
seo_description: Calculate agua_total_litros, agua_base_litros with our free daily water intake calculator. Just enter peso_kg, ejercicio_min and get results instantly.
result_context: The water total includes base metabolic more hydration per ejercicio; a vaso typical contains 250ml.
steps: Multiply weight in kg per 0.033 to water base
Add water base + water extra to total daily
Divide between 0.25 to Obtain vasos of 250ml
mistakes: Beber all the water of a vez (best distribuir during the day)
Not increase water in climas calurosos or per altitud
Count café/alcohol as hydration ( are diuréticos, deshidratan)
